name: spec
description: Author or update a section of coding-harness-spec.md.
prompt_template:
Author or update spec section ${section} in `coding-harness-spec.md`.

Guiding principles (match the existing spec's voice):

- **Normative not narrative.** Spec language describes the contract a conforming implementation must satisfy, not the journey to get there.
- **One concept per heading.** Subsections are cheap; nested run-on paragraphs are expensive.
- **Mechanical gates.** Each section that can have one should declare an *acceptance gate* — the minimum mechanical check that proves an implementation satisfies the section.
- **Cite cross-references.** When this section depends on another (§5, §15, etc.), name it explicitly.
- **No code.** The spec describes contracts; implementations live in the crates.

If the section already exists, propose a diff. If it's new, slot it under the appropriate parent heading. Update the table of contents if there is one.

args.name: section
args.description: Spec section to author or update (e.g., '§7', '§15.Skills', '§5.MemoryCard').
